Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.spi

Class DefaultConnectionProviderImpl

  • Method Details

    • getConnection

      public Connection getConnection(@Nonnull DataSource dataSource, @Nullable TransactionContext context)
      Description copied from interface: ConnectionProvider
      Gets a connection from the given data source.
      Specified by:
      getConnection in interface ConnectionProvider
      Parameters:
      dataSource - the data source to get the connection from.
      context - the transaction context.
      Returns:
      a connection to the database.

    • releaseConnection

      public void releaseConnection(@Nonnull Connection connection, @Nonnull DataSource dataSource, @Nullable TransactionContext context)
      Description copied from interface: ConnectionProvider
      Releases the given connection back to the data source.
      Specified by:
      releaseConnection in interface ConnectionProvider
      Parameters:
      connection - the connection to release.
      dataSource - the data source to which the connection belongs.
      context - the transaction context.
